CustomField.description: Type of Reconciliation Performed. 1. Assumed FH and FC: Reconciles based on MR calculated from reported Assumed Utilization and Actual Utilization. 2. Assumed MR: Reconciles based on MR calculated from Assumed Ratio and average of Actual Ratio. 3. Excess Utilization: Allows reconciliation for components that have been flown more than a specific limit.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Type of Reconciliation Performed. 1. Assumed FH and FC: Reconciles based on MR calculated from reported Assumed Utilization and Actual Utilization. 2. Assumed MR: Reconciles based on MR calculated from Assumed Ratio and average of Actual Ratio. 3. Excess Utilization: Allows reconciliation for components that have been flown more than a specific limit.
CustomField.label: _Reconciliation Type
